# Thoughts To Pen
> My thoughts on Computer Programming || Psychology || Personal Finances || & much more...

Thoughts To Pen is a blog focusing on computer programming algorithms, personal finance strategies, software development tutorials, and psychological insights.

## Author / Publisher
Aman Rana (imAmanRana)

## Main Sections
- [Algorithms](/projects/computer-programming/algorithms/)
- [Java Development](/projects/computer-programming/java/)
- [Personal Finances](/projects/personal-finances/)
- [Posts](/posts/)
- [Projects](/projects/)
